description:
My talk from the Playful conference back in October 2008 (http://www.thisisplayful.com).

I've comped the keynote presentation together with the crudely shot video from the side of the stage. Sorry the audio is a bit muffled, it was recorded from the camcorder so it's pretty low quality. Hope you can get the gist of it though.
fulltitle: Iain Tait - High Scores Talk at Playful London 31.10.08
